LightningComponentBundle.description: Continuing Education shopping cart payment selection.
LightningComponentBundle.masterLabel: REDU Continuing Edu - Shopping Cart Payment

property.name: paramOrderId
property.label: Order Id
property.description: In case of portal enter the order id paramater to fetch from URL, Eg {!orderId} or {!recordId}. Else it will fetch the latest draft order.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Icon Name
property.description: For displaying header icon enter the icon name e.g. standard:webcart.

property.name: iconSize
property.label: Icon Size
property.description: Enter the size of icon e.g small , medium and large.

property.name: titleLabel
property.label: Title Label
property.description: Enter the name which will be displayed as heading

property.name: descriptionText
property.label: Description Text
property.description: Enter the description text which will be displayed above the card.

property.name: creditCardLabel
property.label: Credit Card Label
property.description: Enter the credit card label.

property.name: creditCardDescription
property.label: Credit Card Description
property.description: Enter the credit card description.

property.name: companyLabel
property.label: Company Label
property.description: Enter the company card label.

property.name: companyDescription
property.label: Company Description
property.description: Enter the company card description.

property.name: payButtonLabel
property.label: Pay Button Label
property.description: Enter the pay button label.

property.name: cancelButtonLabel
property.label: Cancel Button Label
property.description: Enter the cancel button label.

property.name: creditCardPaymentRedirectionPage
property.label: Credit card Payment Redirection Path
property.description: Enter credit card redirection path either fully or partially. Add {orderId} parameter which will replace with the related order id.

property.name: companyOrderPaymentRedirectionPage
property.label: Company Order Payment Redirection Path
property.description: Enter company order redirection path for button click either fully or partially or leave.Add {orderId} parameter which will replace with the related order id.

property.name: cancelRedirectionPageName
property.label: Cancel Redirection Path
property.description: Enter cancel redirection path either fully or partially.Add {orderId} parameter which will replace with the related order id.

property.name: rioOrderUpdatedSuccessMessage
property.label: RIO Order Updated Success Message
property.description: Enter the message which will be displayed when rio order updated successfully.

property.name: paymentErrorMessage
property.label: Payment Error Message
property.description: Enter the message which will be displayed user did not select anything and click on pay button.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.

property.name: headerCssClass
property.label: Reserved For Internal Use 1
property.description: To define the styling of the displaying heading enter styling attributes here e.g. font-weight: 600;font-size: 14px;.

property.name: headerBackgroundColour
property.label: Reserved For Internal Use 2
property.description: To define the header container styling enter styling attributes here

property.name: footerBackgroundColour
property.label: Reserved For Internal Use 3
property.description: To define the footer container styling enter styling attributes here

property.name: cardCssClass
property.label: Reserved For Internal Use 4
property.description: To define the styling of the card enter styling attributes here e.g. font-weight: 600;font-size: 14px;.
